title: Workspace
subtitle: private/local mounts
description: Workspace-owned mount catalog, identity resolution, and privacy boundaries for public and local game or template repositories.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Defines workspace catalog, identity, private nested repository, preflight, and parent Git boundaries.

children.title: catalog.json
children.description: Records tracked public workspace mount facts without duplicating game or template identity.

children.title: catalog.mjs
children.description: Validates mount catalogs and derives game or template identity from owned manifests.

children.title: games.mjs
children.description: Filters resolved game mounts, runs private preflight, and provides the parent Git guard used by agent hooks.
children.role: game mount resolver, privacy preflight, and git guard

children.title: catalog.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies catalog schemas, derived identity, collision handling, and dependency record preservation.

children.title: private_games_registry.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies private catalog inclusion, leak preflight, and parent Git guard contracts.
